<!-- Thank you for contributing to The Savio Standard! A maintainer will review this PR — sometimes merging as-is, sometimes discussing right here. Unmerged isn't rejected; it's a conversation. -->

## What does this change, and why?

<!-- A sentence or two in plain language. If it resolves an open issue, mention it: "Fixes #12" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / formatting fix (no CLA needed)
- [ ] Wording improvement or clarification
- [ ] New or substantially revised content
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Repository / tooling (templates, structure, generation)

## Contributor License Agreement

Required for content contributions — new material, substantial rewrites, or translations. Not needed for typos, formatting, or issues. See [CLA.md](../CLA.md) for what you grant and what you keep.

- [ ] I have read and agree to the Contributor License Agreement (CLA.md).
- [ ] Not applicable — this is a typo/formatting fix.

## Checklist

- [ ] No real names of children, families, schools, or administrators appear anywhere in this change — examples are clearly fictional ([Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md))
- [ ] Written for a busy parent: plain, warm, direct ([style guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#style))
- [ ] Any links I added or moved still resolve
- [ ] One topic per PR — unrelated changes are in separate PRs
